items.author: Infrastructure Lead, E-Commerce Platform

items.q: How is TiDB different from PostgreSQL or MySQL?
items.a: TiDB is a distributed, horizontally scalable database with true HTAP capabilities. Unlike traditional SQL databases, it handles both transactional and analytical workloads in real-time without performance degradation. It's fully MySQL-compatible for easy migration.

items.q: Can I migrate my existing MySQL database to TiDB?
items.a: Yes. TiDB is wire-compatible with MySQL 5.7 and 8.0 protocols. Most applications require zero code changes. We provide migration tools and guidance for seamless transition with zero downtime.

items.q: What's the pricing model for TiDB Cloud?
items.a: TiDB Cloud uses consumption-based pricing for compute and storage. You pay only for what you use, with no minimum commitments. Reserve capacity plans are available for 30-50% savings on predictable workloads.

items.q: Is TiDB suitable for high-frequency trading or real-time systems?
items.a: Absolutely. TiDB provides sub-millisecond latency, ACID compliance, and Jepsen-verified correctness. It's battle-tested for mission-critical financial systems and operational workloads.

items.q: How does TiDB handle disaster recovery?
items.a: TiDB offers multi-region replication with automatic failover, configurable RPO/RTO, and integrated backup/restore. All data is automatically distributed across availability zones.
We offer community support (free), professional support with SLA guarantees, and dedicated enterprise support. All tiers include access to our engineering team.

props.title: Ready to Transform Your Data Infrastructure?
